title: Bandcamp has laid off most of their engineers
abstract: Bandcamp has laid off most of their engineers, and you might think the platform is about to crash. Hold your horses! These coders have launched a new venture that’s shaking up the music industry. They’re using AI to auto-generate lyrics and even melodies for songs—basically turning songwriting into a game. Can you believe it?
abstract_zh: 别提了，Bandcamp 把大部分工程师都裁掉了！你是不是觉得他们肯定要凉掉？不急，这帮程序员跑去搞了个新项目，直接把整个音乐圈都惊呆了。他们用AI给每首歌写歌词，连旋律都能自动生成，你敢信？现在，音乐创作就像玩游戏一样简单！
